name_en: 💖With full original green packaging💖Jackie 1961 series waist pack!!️ In the Gucci Beloved collection, the Jackie 1961 series is constantly renewed, launching multiple travel accessories. This waist pack is made of classic GG Supreme canvas, adorned with the brand's iconic red and green webbing. GUCCI BELOVED selects a new fashion item every season, reinterpreting the brand's classic designs. Hidden details: Beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, brown leather trim, gold-tone hardware, red and green webbing, microfiber lining. Inside: 1 leather open pocket. Snap closure and push-in lock.
